labels: enhancement

## Feature Summary

<!-- A concise description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this solve? What pain point or limitation are you experiencing? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you envision this working -->

## Which repo does this belong in?

<!-- The plugin bundles engines from other repos. Confirm this change belongs HERE (the plugin/MCP server/packaging), not in ICO (the compiler) or INTKB (the govern/audit control plane). See CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

- [ ] This change is about the plugin itself (MCP server, its tools, install/packaging, docs)

## Use Case

<!-- Who benefits from this and how? Provide a concrete example -->

## Trust-model / local-first check

<!-- The audit trail is tamper-EVIDENT, not tamper-proof, and the plugin is local-first. -->

- [ ] This does not introduce copy implying "immutable" / "tamper-proof" / "non-repudiation" for local mode
- [ ] This does not add network egress or external sharing without an explicit, opt-in, labeled consent surface

## Alternative Solutions

<!-- Any alternative approaches you've considered and why they fall short -->

## Priority

- [ ] Low — nice to have, no urgency
- [ ] Medium — would improve workflow noticeably
- [ ] High — blocking or significantly impacting productivity
- [ ] Critical — security, data loss, or compliance concern

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, links to similar features in other tools, related issues, etc. -->
